title: Soulection White Label: 012
content:
It's about to be the first of the month and we wanted to hit you with more amazing forward-thinking music to add to your Soulection catalog. We took notice of his work a few months ago when we started seeing Singularis' name pop up on our SoundCloud feed.

It wasn't until we heard "Rain" and then that's when we realized we had to make contact with the young 18 year old producer from a small town in the Netherlands called Gorinchem. After a few emails full of good vibes, here we are with this simplistic, yet, diverse White Label. Singularis has been producing on FL Studio since he was 12 years old but has been playing the piano since he was 5 years old!

We're not surprised because it was his unique chords and melodies that caught our attention. Make sure to show this guy some love. We're excited to see what he can do in the next 3 years. It's crazy to see how the talent keeps getting younger and younger. Lets see where the sound goes!

Enjoy.
